column1: # smoke_gate baseline — titles expected to boot + render real content.
# Identifiers + expected status only; NO game files. Regenerate: UPDATE_BASELINE=1.
# 187 titles (ktf 130 / lgt 44 / skt 13), each PASSed boot+render in two independent
# full runs. Excluded: deterministic fails and ~50%-flaky titles (e.g. 추억의달고나 —
# game paint() NPE ~half the runs; lgt/하이브리드 — blank/black).
